## Key Documents

### `docs/roadmap.md`

| Milestone | Status | Items |
|-----------|--------|-------|
| **alpha-v0.0.1** | ✅ Done | Godot project created, Camiel assets imported, CharacterBody2D player, intro scene, Windows export |
| **alpha-v0.0.2** | 📋 Next | Main menu with Start button, background music + SFX, one collectible (star/biscuit), one instruction, finish marker |
| **alpha-v0.0.3** | 📋 Future | Educational micro-tasks (touch red block, find blue, count 1-2-3), parent/teacher notes, accessibility checks |
| **Design Principles** | — | One idea at a time, clear colors, large UI, no time pressure, no punishment-heavy failure, minimal controls |
| **Technical Improvements** | — | Code signing, GitHub Actions automated exports, reduce legacy assets, proper title screen, in-game version label |

### Current state: `alpha-v0.0.1`

- Godot 4 project (v4.6.2)
- Character: `CharacterBody2D` with idle/walk/run/jump/sit/sleep animations
- Controls: Arrow/WASD + Shift/Space/X
- Intro scene with grass floor, platform, 3 color blocks (rood/geel/blauw)
- Windows `.exe` + `.zip` exported as GitHub Release assets
- Repository made public 2026-04-26; has CI, CodeQL, Dependabot, AI quality gate

agents.label: camiel-roadmap-gather
agents.prompt:
In /Volumes/T9/Code/projects/Project-Camiel, find any roadmap, changelog, todo, or project-status documents. Run ALL of the following commands and read ALL of these files:

1. ls -la (root)
2. find . -maxdepth 2 -iname "roadmap*" -o -iname "changelog*" -o -iname "todo*" -o -iname "plan*" -o -iname "next*" 2>/dev/null
3. cat package.json
4. git branch -a && git tag -l && git log --oneline -15 && git remote -v
5. ls .claude/ 2>/dev/null && cat .claude/CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null
6. ls .github/ 2>/dev/null; ls .gitlab/ 2>/dev/null
7. glab project list --mine 2>/dev/null; glab issue list 2>/dev/null; glab milestone list 2>/dev/null
8. find src/app -maxdepth 2 -type d 2>/dev/null
9. Check for any docs/ directory

Also check: /Volumes/T9/Code/projects/athena/.claude/CLAUDE.md and any ROADMAP* files there.

Return ALL output verbatim.
